items.h: AEW Dynamite - 6/3/2026: 3 Things We Hated And 3 We Loved
items.p: The best and the worst of the first AEW Dynamite of June.

items.h: Kevin Knight joins Don Callis Family on AEW Dynamite
items.p: Kevin Knight has fueled his heel turn by now joining the Don Callis Family on AEW Dynamite. Fans saw the current reigning TNT Champion, Knight, join forces with Don Callis on the June 3, 2026...

items.h: Tomohiro Ishii returns to AEW on Dynamite
items.p: Tomohiro Ishii has finally returned to AEW Dynamite. On Wednesday, June 3, 2026, the episode of AEW Dynamite saw the return of Tomohiro Ishii during a backstage segment featuring The...

items.h: Thekla declares ‘death to Stardom’ for AEW Forbidden Door, president Taro Okada responds
items.p: Reigning AEW Women’s World Champion Thekla’s war with her previous employer Stardom will apparently continue at this month’s AEW x NJPW Forbidden Door. During Wednesday’s AEW Dynamite, Thekla cut...

items.h: Title match, Owen Hart women’s tourney bout set for AEW Collision
items.p: While the overall lineup for this Saturday’s AEW Collision is a bit light in terms of total matches, the show from Youngstown, Ohio, will feature both an AEW Women’s Tag Team title match and a...

items.h: Two Owen Hart tournament matches set for next week’s AEW Dynamite Summer Blockbuster
items.p: Two Owen Hart Foundation tournament bouts are on tap for next Wednesday’s Summer Blockbuster edition of AEW Dynamite from Cincinnati, Ohio. One will be a semifinal in the men’s bracket as former...

items.h: Hook set to make GCW debut at signature event
items.p: AEW wrestler Hook is scheduled to be a part of two significant GCW events [Game Changer Wrestling], including his much-awaited GCW debut. Hook is also set to make his GCW debut against Joey Janela...

items.h: Will Ospreay Earns Spot At AEW Forbidden Door After Chaotic Semi-Final
items.p: Will Ospreay is headed to the finals of the 2026 Men's Owen Hart Foundation tournament after a chaotic win on "AEW Dynamite."

items.h: Will Ospreay Defeats Mark Davis, Advances To Men’s Owen Hart Tournament Finals
items.p: Will Ospreay is moving on to the finals of the Men’s Owen Hart Foundation tournament. Ospreay took on ‘Dunkzilla’ Mark Davis in a tournament semifinal match on the June 3 episode of AEW Dynamite....
